pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 19: DOC1_CONTENT contains 'INVOICE #INV-9982' and 'Vendor: Global Logistics Inc'
Task description (task.json line 5-6) specifies setting Nature to 'Invoice'. The metadata correctly accepts both 'invoice' and 'bill' as valid document nature values for an invoice.
setup_task.sh line 22: DOC2_CONTENT contains 'MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT' and 'StartUp Dynamics'
Task description (task.json line 6) specifies setting Nature to 'Contract'. An NDA (Non-Disclosure Agreement) is a type of contract, so this is correct.

privileged_info_summary: The task involves classifying two synthetic documents in a Nuxeo Platform 'Incoming Scans' workspace. Document 1 is an invoice from Global Logistics Inc (Invoice #INV-9982, dated October 24, 2024, amount $1,250.00) requiring title and nature metadata updates. Document 2 is a Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement between Nuxeo Corp and StartUp Dynamics requiring similar metadata updates. All expected title keywords and nature values have been verified against the actual document content embedded in the setup script. The data is entirely synthetic, created for task demonstration purposes within the Nuxeo ECM environment.
